lines.en: Perhaps because I had held back so long, a massive amount of cum poured into Betty, spilling from where we were joined as it couldn't be contained in her tight pussy.

lines.name: ベティ
lines.en: Aah...♡

lines.jp:
ベティはというと、あまりの快感の波に半ば意識を失っているらしい。
……どうやら、救助が来る前に１人で片づけをするしかないらしい。
lines.en: As for Betty, she seemed to have lost consciousness from the overwhelming waves of pleasure. ...It seemed I would have to clean up by myself before the rescue party arrived.
